conservative.name: Glimpse Eternity
conservative.requirements:
4 Power
Not engaged with an enemy. If you perform the prepare manoeuvre beforehand, reduce the difficulty modifier to KK

success.description: The uttermost secrets of the future are revealed to you! You may move up to 2 recharge tokens from any of your currently recharging cards to any other of your currently recharging action cards

boon.description: While this card is recharging, enemies add to attacks that target you

sigmarsComet.description: You may move recharge tokens to and from anyone's recharging actions, instead of just yours. You may move tokens from actions belonging to one character to actions belonging to a different character, or between actions belonging to one character

reckless.name: Glimpse Eternity
reckless.requirements:
4 Power
Not engaged with an enemy. if you perform the prepare manoeuve beforehand, reduce the difficulty modifier to KK

success.description: The uttermost secrets of the future are revealed to you! You may move up to 1 recharge token from any of your currently recharging cards to any other of your currently recharging action cards

boon.description: While this card is recharging, enemies add to attacks that target you

sigmarsComet.description: You may move recharge tokens to and from anyone's recharging actions, instead of just yours. You may move tokens from actions belonging to one character to actions belonging to a different character, or between actions belonging to one character
